content:
# Smart Water Flooding

**Summary**: A technique where the chemical composition of injected water is modified to improve oil recovery.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-adam|ADAM, 2016]] investigated smart water flooding using 10x diluted seawater in carbonate cores.

## Scientific Context

- [[2016-adam|ADAM, 2016]] Aims to alter rock wettability or reduce interfacial tension.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2016-adam|ADAM, 2016]] Compared against standard seawater and formation brine.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Smart water (10x diluted) showed a shift toward more water-wet conditions compared to standard seawater. ([[2016-adam|ADAM, 2016, p. 118]])
